title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) — giving AI access to external knowledge at query time

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Three-step RAG pipeline flow: user query → retrieve (search knowledge source, return passages) → augment (combine question + passages into enriched prompt) → generate (model produces grounded answer) → response to user
depth_signals: topic has a named three-step pipeline requiring sequential explanation (retrieve, augment, generate)
requires a RAG-vs-fine-tuning comparison plus motivation section — two major sub-arguments
five named Week-14 components require named-and-deferred treatment, adding explanatory overhead
